api_key.description: Datadog API key, sent as the DD-API-KEY header. Never logged.

application_key.description: Datadog application key, sent as the DD-APPLICATION-KEY header. Never logged.

base_url.description: Datadog API base URL override for tests, proxies, or a regional site (e.g. https://api.datadoghq.eu, https://api.us3.datadoghq.com).
